response: {"name":"RBFOX2-knockdown transcriptome profiling by microarray","description":"Affymetrix HTA2.0 microarray profiling of RBFOX2 shRNA knockdown in 293T cells to identify RBFOX2-responsive cassette exon splicing events, with RMA normalization and per-gene expression correction followed by Student's t-test to call differential splicing.","data_type":"other","raw_data_source":null,"steps":[{"step_number":1,"description":"293T cells were transduced with 3 independent lentiviral shRNAs targeting RBFOX2 (TRCN0000074544, TRCN0000074546, TRCN0000074543) and a non-targeting control (SHC016), with 3 independent transductions per shRNA, followed by 10 days of puromycin selection.","input_data":"293T cells","output_data":"Stably transduced, puromycin-selected 293T cell pools with RBFOX2 knockdown or non-targeting control","software":null,"software_version":null,"parameters":{"shRNA_targeting":"TRCN0000074544, TRCN0000074546, TRCN0000074543 (Sigma)","non_targeting_control":"SHC016 (Sigma)","replicates_per_shRNA":"3 independent transductions","selection_agent":"Puromycin","selection_duration":"10 days"},"code_reference":null},{"step_number":2,"description":"RBFOX2 protein knockdown was validated by western blotting using RBFOX2 and GAPDH antibodies, imaged on the Odyssey fluorescent imager, and quantitated with median local background correction.","input_data":"Protein lysates from transduced 293T cells","output_data":"Validated RBFOX2 knockdown efficiency measurements","software":"Image Studio Lite","software_version":null,"parameters":{"RBFOX2_antibody":"A300-864A (Bethyl)","GAPDH_antibody":"ab8245 (Abcam)","imager":"Odyssey fluorescent imager (LiCor)","background_correction":"median local background correction"},"code_reference":null},{"step_number":3,"description":"Total RNA was isolated from transduced cells using Trizol extraction and microarray libraries were prepared using the WT Expression Kit.","input_data":"Transduced, puromycin-selected 293T cells","output_data":"Amplified and labeled RNA samples ready for microarray hybridization","software":"WT Expression Kit (Ambion)","software_version":null,"parameters":{"RNA_isolation_reagent":"Trizol (Thermo Fisher Scientific)","library_prep_kit":"WT Expression Kit (Ambion)"},"code_reference":null},{"step_number":4,"description":"Labeled RNA samples were hybridized to Affymetrix HTA2.0 microarrays and scanned.","input_data":"Labeled RNA samples","output_data":"Raw microarray intensity data (CEL files)","software":null,"software_version":null,"parameters":{"array_platform":"Affymetrix HTA2.0"},"code_reference":null},{"step_number":5,"description":"All probe signals were RMA-normalized using Affymetrix Expression Console.","input_data":"Raw microarray intensity data (CEL files)","output_data":"RMA-normalized probe-level expression values","software":"Affymetrix Expression Console","software_version":null,"parameters":{"normalization_method":"RMA"},"code_reference":null},{"step_number":6,"description":"Probes corresponding to cassette exons (exclusion junction, upstream and downstream inclusion junction, and inclusion exonic probes) were identified and normalized against the average per-gene signal to remove gene expression changes.","input_data":"RMA-normalized probe-level expression values","output_data":"Per-gene-normalized residuals for cassette exon probes","software":null,"software_version":null,"parameters":{"probe_types":"exclusion junction, upstream inclusion junction, downstream inclusion junction, inclusion exonic probes","normalization":"average signal on a per-gene basis"},"code_reference":null},{"step_number":7,"description":"Student's t-test was performed on residuals for inclusion and exclusion probes separately to identify robust splicing changes, using thresholds on p-value and SepScore (normalized change in exclusion minus normalized change in inclusion).","input_data":"Per-gene-normalized residuals for cassette exon probes","output_data":"Sets of differentially spliced cassette exons per shRNA (197 exons for TRCN0000074544; 217 exons for TRCN0000074543)","software":"custom code","software_version":null,"parameters":{"statistical_test":"Student's t-test","p_value_threshold":"≤ 0.001","SepScore_threshold":"|SepScore| ≥ 0.5","SepScore_definition":"normalized change in exclusion minus normalized change in inclusion","exons_TRCN0000074544":"197","exons_TRCN0000074543":"217"},"code_reference":"https://github.com/gpratt/gatk/releases/tag/2.3.2"},{"step_number":8,"description":"Differentially spliced cassette exons were overlapped with RBFOX2 eCLIP peaks by associating each eCLIP peak with a cassette exon if the peak was located anywhere in the flanking upstream or downstream intron.","input_data":"Differentially spliced cassette exons (197 events from TRCN0000074544) and RBFOX2 eCLIP peak calls","output_data":"Cassette exons with associated nearby RBFOX2 eCLIP binding peaks","software":null,"software_version":null,"parameters":{"shRNA_used_for_eCLIP_overlap":"TRCN0000074544 (197 events)","peak_association_rule":"eCLIP peak located at any position in flanking upstream or downstream intron"},"code_reference":"https://github.com/gpratt/gatk/releases/tag/2.3.2"}],"figures_produced":["Supplementary Figure 10d","Supplementary Figure 10e"]}
